data.body:
PLAN-REVIEW: both epic (6 critical) and 368c (1 critical) BLOCKed on real design gaps. REMEDIATED epic + children 42d1/368c/8f1d descriptions + epic comment:
- config: .rebar/trusted_environments.yaml YAML schema {env_id, keys[{public_key, added_at_commit, revoked_at_commit}]}
- era: explicit-SHA model (out-of-band keys can't use tickets-branch resolve_event_commit); reuse git merge-base --is-ancestor RULE + key_not_valid_at_era verdict only
- 368c verdict: two-phase check (any-historical-key then era) emits key_not_valid_at_era vs bad_signature, mirroring verify_authorship.py
- migration: named artifact docs/migrations/hmac-opcert-removal.md (F1)
Re-reviews running (bg blv4nyhix epic, bpgojlsqk 368c). Blocked on both PASSing before claim.
